cta_health_issues: CTAs are only at the top. Move at least one to mid-article or conclusion where readers are most engaged.
No CTA at the end of the article. Readers who finish are your highest-intent audience.
Hard commercial CTA at the top of a thought leadership article. Use a softer CTA (newsletter, related content) or move it later.
Multiple CTAs crowding the top of the article.
